ksa_text: Skill in defining and enforcing enterprise data modeling standards, naming conventions, and structural patterns across engineering teams.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in design modeling and building use cases (e.g., unified modeling language).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-S-003 (DA, Skill) maps to Market Research Analyst scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4340 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.434, nice=0.427, onet=0.426. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within market research, survey analysis, and consumer insights.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4340 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DA-S-003 (DA, composite 0.4340) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DCWF 421 and DDAT Data Architect profiles; DA competencies at awareness level appear in senior IC data analyst role profiles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4340 with signal across ddat=0.434, nice=0.427, onet=0.426 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from DA-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Market Research Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4340, domain DA, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
